transcript: Absinthe? Yeah, we have some absinthe; we’ve got Kübler and Pernod.
Uhh, I don’t got Pernod but, uh, like, ah, Green Moon. You’re looking for absinthe, right?

Real green stuff, ah, the classic is Vieux Pontarlier, right here. That’s the real deal; ’s the right stuff. I also have Verte la Sorcière, which is real green. Uh, I have Swiss absinthe: Kübler Verte. It’s not as green as the Pontarlier—
Oh, yes sir! Um, we have Leopold Brothers, Absinthe Verte, Lucid, Absinthe Superieure, and Absente, Absente Refined.
Is that what you’re looki—wh—are you looking for something, or...?
I was on the line with someone who was asking for vatten.
We do have some nice, uh, sparkling Rosés, though. But, yeah, we don’t carry—
Hello? Hey, this is Jackson. Am I still on the phone?—
Oh, I’m sorry about that; I dropped the phone.
I dropped the phone. I mean, I—I answered the phone and I couldn’t understand what—what the question was.
—Uh, thi—and this—Oh! You guys called me! [laughs]
